title: F1® The Movie
description: Sonny Hayes was the most promising phenom in the 1990s in FORMULA 1® until an accident on the track. Thirty years later, his former teammate Ruben Cervantes convinces him to come back and drive alongside hotshot rookie Joshua Pearce for one last chance to be the best in the world. Sonny’s past catches up with him, and he finds that the road to redemption is not something you can travel alone.

title: Fred Vasseur Praises Hamilton’s Race Management | Barcelona-Catalunya GP Race 2026
description:
🎙️ Post Race Interview | Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix 2026

Ferrari Team Principal Fred Vasseur reacts after a major day for Lewis Hamilton and Ferrari at the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix. Vasseur praises Hamilton’s outstanding pace and race management, while staying calm on Ferrari’s title hopes and saying the result is a huge boost in confidence for the team.

title: Why Lewis Hamilton's Ferrari fairytale is a LONG way from over | Up To Speed
description:
Will, Naomi and DC are back, after Barcelona and a moment of geniune sporting history - as Lewis Hamilton won his first Grand Prix in a Ferrari - and blew the race for the title wide open!
 
A statement win for arguably the greatest to ever do it - was Lewis' victory a triumph of skill or strategy? How nervous will Mercedes and Toto Wolff be feeling and Nico Hulkenberg's 'freak' retirement explained... 
 
Plus, why FIA's U-Turn on Pierre Gasly's penalty in Monaco has 'opened a can of worms' and
